# Summary
Describe the change and the intended outcome.

# Problem
What problem does this PR solve?

# Approach
How did you solve it?

# Affected Documents
List changed files and why they changed.

# Assumptions
List assumptions and uncertainty.

# Open Questions
List unresolved questions or follow-up topics.

# Validation
- [ ] Links checked
- [ ] Language is clear and respectful
- [ ] Related index entries updated (if needed)
- [ ] Decision record added or updated (if needed)
